B. Patient's Death 

The documented event of a patient's death would result in a full 30-day 
period payment, unless the death occurred in a low utilization payment 
adjusted 30-day period. Consistent with all episodes in which a patient 
receives four or fewer visits, if the patient's death occurred during a low 
utilization adjusted 30-day payment period, the period would be paid at 
the low utilization
